summary: WMS Operator Module complete testing - All backend endpoints working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend operator view and WMS picking form with operator dropdown verified via Playwright.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/wms/operators returns list of operator-role users (role='operator', no password_hash exposed) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/wms/pick-tickets creates ticket with assigned_to, assigned_to_name, picking_status fields - PASS
Backend: Pick ticket with assigned_to has picking_status='assigned', without has 'unassigned' - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/wms/pick-tickets/{ticket_id}/assign allows admin to assign ticket to operator - PASS
Backend: PUT /assign requires admin role (403 for operator, 401 for unauthenticated) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/operator/my-tickets returns only tickets assigned to logged-in operator (excludes confirmed) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/wms/pick-tickets/{ticket_id}/pick-progress saves partial/complete picking progress - PASS
Backend: Partial progress sets picking_status='in_progress', complete sets 'completed' and status='confirmed' - PASS
Backend: GET /api/wms/operator/completed-tickets returns completed tickets for operator - PASS
Backend: All operator endpoints require authentication (401) - PASS
Frontend: Operator login redirects to /operator route instead of /dashboard - PASS
Frontend: Operator view header shows 'Surtido de Pedidos' with operator name and pending count badge - PASS
Frontend: Sidebar shows tickets in 'EN PROGRESO' and 'ASIGNADOS' categories with progress bars - PASS
Frontend: Clicking a ticket shows picking interface with size rows, quantity inputs, and 'mark full' buttons - PASS
Frontend: 'Guardar Progreso' (save partial) and 'Completar Surtido' (complete) buttons present - PASS
Frontend: Size rows expandable to show inventory locations - PASS
Frontend: WMS Picking form has 'Asignar Operador' dropdown listing operators (data-testid='pick-operator-select') - PASS
Frontend: Operator dropdown shows 'Sin asignar' and available operators (Juan Operador) - PASS
Frontend: Pick tickets list shows operator assignment badges and picking_status - PASS

issues: React hydration warnings about <span> elements inside <option>, <tbody>, <tr> - cosmetic issue from dev tooling, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Operator endpoints correctly filter by user_id OR email for flexibility
Assignment endpoint (PUT /assign) properly requires admin role via require_admin
Pick progress endpoint allows any authenticated user to update their assigned ticket
Frontend OperatorView.js has all data-testid attributes for testing
WMS.js PickingModule loads operators via GET /api/wms/operators and populates dropdown
seed_data_creation: Multiple test pick tickets created during backend tests assigned to operator user_06e5cd72e6ab with various picking_status states (assigned, in_progress, completed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WMS Operator Module fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/wms/operators (list operators), PUT /pick-tickets/{id}/assign (admin assigns), GET /operator/my-tickets (operator's pending tickets), PUT /pick-tickets/{id}/pick-progress (save progress), GET /operator/completed-tickets. Operator user exists: operador1@test.com / operador123 (user_id: user_06e5cd72e6ab, name: Juan Operador). Frontend /operator route shows picking interface. WMS /wms route has 'Asignar Operador' dropdown in Picking form. No mocked APIs.
